name: Synth Riders
summary:
New DLC Available for Purchase today!

Welcome back to the 1980s, Players! You knew a “Side B” was coming to our Mixtape and this time we’re delivering seven huge hits from the era when the only thing bigger than the music was the hair!

"80s Mixtape - Side B" wakes you up with unforgettable tracks and makes you never wanna give up playing this collection. These chart-toppers – all from the decade that inspired Synth Riders neon-soaked worlds – will take you back to the 80s-themed Endless Café stage as...
